children.heading: Conversion to UHF
children.label: a Conversion to UHF
children.text: The Director of the International Broadcasting Bureau shall implement a conversion of television broadcasting to Cuba under the Television Marti Service to ultra high frequency (UHF) broadcasting.

children.heading: Periodic reports
children.label: b Periodic reports
children.text: Not later than 45 days after , and every three months thereafter until the conversion described in subsection (a) is fully implemented, the Director of the International Broadcasting Bureau shall submit a report to the appropriate congressional committees on the progress made in carrying out subsection (a).March 12, 1996

children.heading: Termination of broadcasting authorities
children.label: c Termination of broadcasting authorities
children.text: Upon transmittal of a determination under , the Television Broadcasting to Cuba Act ( and following) and the Radio Broadcasting to Cuba Act ( and following) are repealed.section 6063(c)(3) of this title22 U.S.C. 1465aa22 U.S.C. 1465
